title: NZ School Holidays Travel Tips — How to Beat the Crowds and Save Money
meta_desc: Discover how to save money and avoid crowds during NZ school holidays with our expert travel tips and tricks
intro: If you're planning to travel during the NZ school holidays, be prepared for peak prices and crowds. However, with some insider knowledge, you can save up to 30% on accommodation and activities. In this article, we'll share our top tips for beating the crowds and saving money during the school holidays.

sections.heading: Plan Ahead and Book Early
sections.body: Booking your accommodation and activities well in advance can save you a significant amount of money. For example, a family room at the Novotel Auckland Airport can cost upwards of $400 per night during peak season, but booking 6 months in advance can reduce the price to around $280 per night.

sections.heading: Travel During the Shoulder Season
sections.body: If you can, try to travel during the shoulder season, which is the period between the peak and off-peak seasons. This can be a great way to save money and avoid the crowds. For example, the drive from Auckland to Rotorua takes around 3 hours, and during the shoulder season, you can often find accommodation prices reduced by up to 20%.

sections.heading: Top Destinations for Families
list: Queenstown: ski resorts, hiking trails, and scenic flights from $100 per person
Rotorua: geothermal parks, water parks, and Maori cultural experiences from $50 per person
Auckland: museums, zoos, and theme parks from $20 per person

sections.heading: Save Money on Activities
sections.body: Instead of buying individual tickets for activities, consider purchasing a family pass or package deal. For example, a family pass to the Skyline Gondola in Queenstown can cost around $120, but a package deal that includes lunch and a scenic flight can cost around $250, saving you up to $100 per person.

sections.heading: Get the Best Deals on Accommodation

cta.text: Use our NZ Family Travel Budget Calculator to find the best deals on accommodation

sections.heading: Explore More of NZ with a Campervan
sections.body: Consider renting a campervan for your next family road trip. With prices starting from around $100 per day, it can be a cost-effective and flexible way to travel. Check out our campervan section for more information and to book your next adventure.

cta.text: Rent a campervan for your next family road trip
